DISCOVERY, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE DEC-10-2020 HEARING RE: PETITIONER/JUDGMENT CREDITOR PAUL SPIEGEL'S MOTION FOR ORDER COMPELLING RESPONSE TO DEMAND FOR INSPECTION AND COPYING OF DOCUMENTS IN AID OF ENFORCEMENT OF JUDGMENT, SET ONE, FROM JUDGMENT DEBTOR LIGANDAL, INC. AND PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. THE MOTION OF PAUL SPIEGEL IS GRANTED. LIGANDAL, INC. SHALL SERVE CODE-COMPLIANT RESPONSES WITHOUT OBJECTIONS TO MR. SPIEGEL'S DEMAND FOR INSPECTION (SET 1) BY JANUARY 8, 2021. (CCP SEC. 2031.300(A).) LINGANDAL, INC. SHALL ALSO CONCURRENTLY PRODUCE DOCUMENTS IN RESPONSE TO CATEGORIES 10, 11, 12 AND 18 OF THE INSPECTION DEMAND. THE TERM "CODE-COMPLIANT" MEANS IN COMPLIANCE WITH THE CALIFORNIA CIVIL DISCOVERY ACT, CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTIONS 2016.010 ET SEQ., AS INTERPRETED BY THE DECISIONS OF THE COURTS OF THIS STATE, INCLUDING, WITHOUT LIMITATION, THE CASE DECISIONS CITED IN DPA'S MOVING PAPERS. JUDGE PRO TEM TO PREPARE, SIGN, AND SUBMIT AN ORDER. JUDGE PRO TEM: PETER VESTAL; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion By Judgment Creditor Paul Spiegel For Order Compelling Response To Demand For Inspection And Copying Of Documents In Aid Of Enforcement Of Judgment, Set One, From Judgment Debtor Ligandal, Inc. And Production Of Documents
Off Calendar Dec-10-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: Petitioner/Judgment Creditor Paul Spiegel's Motion For Order Compelling Response To Demand For Inspection And Copying Of Documents In Aid Of Enforcement Of Judgment, Set One, From Judgment Debtor Ligandal, Inc. And Production Of Documents.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. The motion of Paul Spiegel is GRANTED. Ligandal, Inc. shall serve code-compliant responses without objections to Mr. Spiegel's Demand for Inspection (Set 1) by January 8, 2021. (CCP Sec. 2031.300(a).) Lingandal, Inc. shall also concurrently produce documents in response to categories 10, 11, 12 and 18 of the inspection demand. The term "code-compliant" means in compliance with the California Civil Discovery Act, Code of Civil Procedure sections 2016.010 et seq., as interpreted by the decisions of the courts of this state, including, without limitation, the case decisions cited in DPA's moving papers.

Judge Pro Tem to prepare, sign, and submit an order.

Judge Pro Tem: Peter Vestal; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)
